import pandas as pd

def task_func(text):
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        raise ValueError("Text must be a string.")

    # Tokenize words and filter out non-alphanumeric words (except for '$')
    tokens = [word for word in nltk.word_tokenize(text) if all(char not in punctuation or char == '$' for char in word)]

    # Count frequency of each '$' prefixed word
    word_freq = {word: tokens.count(word) for word in set(tokens) if word and word[0] == '$'}

    # Create a pandas DataFrame to store the results
    word_freq_df = pd.DataFrame(list(word_freq.items()), columns=["Word", "Frequency"])

    return word_freq_df
